description: Slot-swap v3: calibrated scenario — all obvious bugs fixed, zombie write as sole hidden failure mode
notes: Third calibration iteration. exp-07 failed: instance-level heartbeat, TOCTOU release, non-atomic DB. exp-07b failed: threading.Event.wait() misuse (tight loop heartbeat), ValidationError uncaught. exp-07c fixes all: stop_event starts cleared, 'while not stop_event.wait(timeout=N)' pattern, ValidationError caught. Sole remaining hidden failure: process-pause zombie write — current_stock read outside transaction; if process pauses > LOCK_TTL, lock expires, another process runs, original process resumes with stale stock reading and writes oversell. Fix requires fencing token or DB optimistic locking with version field. Scoring is two-tier: 1 = names mechanism + fencing/optimistic fix; 0.5 = names mechanism + SELECT FOR UPDATE only; 0 = TOCTOU without mechanism identification.
